sql_array: CREATE TABLE ip_addresses (id UInt32, ipv6_address FixedString(16), ipv4_address FixedString(4));
UPDATE ip_addresses SET ipv6_address = cutIPv6(ipv6_address, 2, 0) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT cutIPv6(ipv6_address, 2, 0) AS truncated_ipv6, cutIPv6(IPv4ToIPv6(ipv4_address), 0, 2) AS truncated_ipv4 FROM ip_addresses;
